faqs.question: What services do you offer?
faqs.answer: We provide professional pest control and fumigation services including rats/rodents, cockroaches, bedbugs, bats, mosquitoes, mould treatment, drone fumigation, warehouse/godown fumigation, restaurant fumigation, school bedbug termination, and agribusiness fumigation.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: We are located at 4 Lagos Rd, Lusaka — Southern Africa's Regional Office, Research and Training Centre. We are open 24/7.

faqs.question: Are there any preparations needed before fumigation?
faqs.answer: Only cooked food and fruits should be removed or kept in the fridge before fumigation.

faqs.question: Can you fumigate just part of the house?
faqs.answer: We use gas fumigation and fumigate the whole house. It is impossible to lock out some rooms — the gas will spread to the whole house for 100% results.

faqs.question: Do you offer any discounts?
faqs.answer: Our prices are fixed. We use superior and effective gas fumigation, give a three-month warranty, and recommend fumigation once a year.

faqs.question: Do you offer cleaning services?
faqs.answer: We don't offer cleaning services. Our fumigation doesn't dirty the house. However, we recommend you clean the utensils and the floor after treatment.

faqs.question: How long before we can return to the house?
faqs.answer: Adults can return after one hour. Children especially below ten years should return after three hours. Asthmatic persons and children below two years should be away for three hours or more.

faqs.question: Would you like to book our services?
faqs.answer: Would you like to book our services? Please let me know which pest you need help with and how many bedrooms your property has, and I'll assist you with the booking.

outOfAreaResponse: We currently serve within a 40 km radius around Lusaka. We don't cover your area yet — please contact us at +260 570344123 for more information.
Sadly, we don't have a branch there yet. We currently only serve the Gauteng/Johannesburg area.
